message:
feat(cli): Add --codegen-only and --compile-only flags to test runner

Add two new flags for partial test execution:
- --codegen-only: Only run codegen phase (py → zig), skip compile and run
- --compile-only: Run codegen + compile, skip test execution

Useful for quickly validating that all tests can be generated/compiled
without waiting for full test execution.

Examples:
  metal0 test tests/cpython --codegen-only  # Fast codegen validation
  metal0 test tests/cpython --compile-only  # Validate compilation
